name: path-traversal
note: A param naming a file/path the server reads back.

probe.strategy: Send ../../../../etc/passwd and an encoded ..%2f variant (Windows: ..\..\windows\win.ini). Confirm IN-BAND by the file contents appearing in the response — do not write or delete anything.
probe.signal: Server file contents (e.g. root:x:0:0 from /etc/passwd) appear in the response.

assert: expect(traversalResponse.status(), 'a path param must not read files outside its directory').toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(400);
